title: NDD CLI Canonical Spec
purpose: Define the command behavior and fail-closed rules for the NDD CLI.
authorityBoundary: The CLI may orchestrate the conveyor, but it may not invent product truth.
behaviorAuthority: dispatch live work to Gemini Flash
compute hashes from actual files on disk
forbiddenBehaviors: silently fall back to mock mode
selfBindingRule: The CLI must project its own self sketch from its declared visualProjectionModel in projections/visual-models rather than hard-code final proof.
completionPosture: The CLI is a doorway and a trust surface, not a competing narrative.
